archetype: Archetype 2: The Performance Pro (Dark Theme) - adapted for Elite Trading and Precision
emotional_tone: Authoritative, elite, precise, high-speed, cinematic, command-center focus

fonts.name: IBM Plex Mono
fonts.usage: Data, Numbers, Tickers, Stock Prices, Timestamps

fonts.name: IBM Plex Sans
fonts.usage: Body Text, UI Elements, Navigation, General Information

layout_and_spacing.spacing_scale: Use standard Tailwind scale (p-2, p-4, p-6). Emphasize structural density over empty negative space, since it's a data-heavy dashboard.
layout_and_spacing.grid_strategy: MODE B: The 'Control Room' Grid. Base Grid: grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4 or 12. Tight gaps (gap-4 or gap-6). The main chart must span large columns, surrounded by widget panels.
layout_and_spacing.container_styles: The 'Technical' Look: Containers use 1px solid borders (border-white/10) with sharp corners (rounded-none or rounded-sm max). Avoid heavy drop shadows in favor of grid lines.
layout_and_spacing.alignment: Left-align dense metrics and tabular data for fast scanning. Align numbers to the right in data tables.

components_strategy.forms_and_inputs: Shadcn based. Deep dark background, white text, 1px border. Focus states use Volt Blue rings. Keep inputs sharp and technical.
components_strategy.buttons: Tactile minimalism. Solid primary background for main CTAs. Explicit hover states must set text color (e.g. hover:bg-white hover:text-black).
components_strategy.cards_panels: Grid Borders style. Panels separated by thin lines. No floating cards.
components_strategy.charts: Recharts. Central dominant placement. Use neon accent lines (Green/Red/Blue) on dark background. Grid lines should be very subtle (rgba(255,255,255,0.05)).
components_strategy.alerts_notifications: Glassmorphism for urgent notifications (backdrop-blur-xl bg-black/80, 1px border colored by alert type). MUST pulse for urgency.
components_strategy.image_upload: Prominent drag-and-drop zone. Use dashed borders. On hover, apply a 'Tracing Beam' effect or border color shift to Volt Blue.

motion_and_interactions.hover: Precise, snappy transitions (duration-150). Text and background color must explicitly change.
motion_and_interactions.alerts: Urgent stock alerts should flash or pulse twice on entry.

assets_and_media.icons_library: lucide-react (default) for sharp, consistent line icons.

image_urls.description: High-end abstract deep charcoal background with subtle neon green and pink glowing geometric lines.
image_urls.usage_instructions: Use as a background overlay in non-data heavy areas (like login screen or sidebar footer) with very low opacity to give the app a premium, high-tech trading feel.

testing.attributes: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a `data-testid` attribute in kebab-case format (e.g., `data-testid="stock-search-input"`).

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly follow the Performance Pro dark archetype. No soft pastels or light themes.
Include Google Fonts imports for Chivo, IBM Plex Mono, and IBM Plex Sans in the main CSS file.
Build the dashboard using a dense 'Control Room' grid where the main chart dominates and smaller panels surround it.
Implement clear, high-contrast Buy (Electric Green #00FF66) and Sell (Electric Blaze #FF3B30) semantic colors.
Use standard HTML + Tailwind for structural layouts, and customized Shadcn components for complex interactions (Dropdowns, Dialogs, etc.).
The image upload component for chart analysis should be intuitive and centrally accessible.
Use .js files (JSX syntax) since the environment is JavaScript-based.
Apply data-testid to all interactive components.
Urgent notifications must be highly visible, utilizing glassmorphism and pulsing animations.
